ascend_skill.desc:
Yukari can inflict Erosion on foes.
When other allies deal skill damage to a foe inflicted with Erosion, restore HP to all allies equal to 24.5% of Yukari's Attack + 800/1600/2400 (effect changes at Lv. 1/50/70, respectively), and gain 1 Whisperwind stack (stacks up to 2 times). This effect can only activate once between the start of Yukari's turn and the start of her next turn.
ascend_skill.name: Unforgettable Feeling

ascend_skill.desc:
At the start of battle, gain up to the maximum number of Whisperwind stacks, and fill Theurgy gauge by 70. If the Theurgy gauge is increased above the maximum on the first turn, up to 35 above the maximum can be reserved.
Also, when using a skill on an ally, increase the main target's pierce rate by 20% more for 2 turns. If using Tailwind's Breath, restore 1200 more HP to all allies, and restore 30% more HP to the main target.
ascend_skill.name: Pull the Trigger

ascend_skill.desc: When activating a Theurgy, nullify spiritual ailments on Yukari, and also increase party's critical damage by 30%. Lasts for 2 turns.
ascend_skill.name: Sign of the Lovers

ascend_skill.desc: Increase the skill levels of Gale Burst and Arrow of Life by 3.
ascend_skill.name: Girl Clad in Pink

ascend_skill.desc: When using a Theurgy, also restore HP to the ally with the lowest HP by 5% of Yukari's Attack + 500, and also increase party's damage by 10% for 2 turns.
ascend_skill.name: Healing Mastery

ascend_skill.desc: Increase the skill levels of Tailwind's Breath and Combat Tactics by 3.
ascend_skill.name: Pursuit of Doubt

ascend_skill.desc:
Double the Theurgy gauge increase from Arrow of Life.
Also, when an ally uses a Theurgy, increase critical damage by 30% for 2 turns.
ascend_skill.name: Spring Day's Meeting

normal_skill.desc:
Deal Wind damage to 1 foe equal to 200.1%/220.6%/212.4%/232.9% of Attack. Also, inflict Windswept and Erosion for 2 turns. Multiple foes cannot be inflicted with Erosion at the same time. If a foe with Erosion is defeated, Erosion is transferred to the foe with the highest HP.
Passive: When an ally attacks a foe with a skill, if any target is inflicted with Erosion, increase that skill's Attack by 8.8%/9.7%/9.3%/10.2% + 0.72% for every 100 points of Yukari's Attack (up to a maximum of 29.3%/32.3%/31.1%/34.1%).
normal_skill.name: Gale Burst

normal_skill.desc:
Decrease party's damage taken by 29.3%/32.3%/31.1%/34.1% for 3 turns.
Also, increase the main target's Attack by 7.8%/8.6%/8.3%/9.1% + 0.78% for every 100 points of Yukari's Attack (up to a maximum of 31.2%/34.4%/33.2%/36.4%), and increase damage by 0.24% for every 100 points of Yukari's Attack (up to a maximum of 9.8%/10.8%/10.4%/11.4%) for 2 turns.
normal_skill.name: Tailwind's Breath

normal_skill.desc:
Restore HP to all allies equal to 39.1%/43.1%/41.5%/45.6% of Yukari's Attack + 2507/3158/3081/3773.
Spend all Whisperwind stacks, and for each stack spent, increase the main target's Theurgy gauge by 17.5, and after the next time the target activates a Theurgy, increase Attack by 29.3%/32.3%/31.1%/34.1% for 2 turns. This effect stacks up to 2 times. If the Theurgy gauge is increased above the maximum, the amount above the maximum is temporarily reserved for up to 2 turns, and returned after the Theurgy is activated.
If the main target has a Highlight, the next time they activate a Highlight, increase final damage amplification by 9.8%/10.8%/10.4%/11.4% for every Whisperwind stack spent.
normal_skill.name: Arrow of Life

passive_skill.desc: When Yukari is present, increase party's Highlight and Theurgy damage by 45.0%. When an ally activates a Highlight or Theurgy, increase that ally's damage by 20.0% for 2 turns.
passive_skill.name: Tailwind's Air

passive_skill.desc: During battle, increase max HP by 60 for every 100 points of Yukari's Attack (up to a maximum of 2700).
passive_skill.name: Archer's Courage

theurgia_skill.desc:
Can be activated when Theurgy gauge is at 70. Deal Wind damage to 1 foe equal to 406.0%/447.6%/431.0%/472.6% of Attack. Also, remove 2 buffs from the target, and inflict Windswept and Erosion.
Also, increase party's damage by 0.48% for every 100 points of Yukari's Attack (up to a maximum of 19.5%/21.5%/20.7%/22.7%) for 2 turns.
theurgia_skill.name: Cyclone Arrow
